prevalence.source: SBC/SBACV guidance; DataSUS risk factor surveys

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; high cardiovascular risk and disability

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Ankle-brachial index <0.90; confirm with Doppler ultrasound or imaging

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: limited ABI screening in primary care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; risk factor control varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ABI and Doppler available mainly in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Smoking cessation, antiplatelets, statins, supervised walking; revascularization when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underdiagnosis and limited vascular surgery access outside major cities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SUS coverage for antiplatelets/statins and chronic disease programs
